prompt: Hand-drawn coloured illustration — clean, elegant, editorial. Visible ink and pencil line work with soft hand-painted colour fills (coloured-pencil / gouache feel). Deep charcoal near-black background so it sits on a dark page, but the artwork itself is warm and colourful in a muted earthy palette (ochre, terracotta, teal, sage green, indigo, cream); no neon, no glow, no light beams, no orange haze, no 3D-render look. Calm and uncluttered. Ultra-wide banner, 16:5. Three everyday moments of force side by side across the frame: a bare foot striking a football as it lifts off the ground, a hand squeezing a lemon so its shape dents and a few juice drops fly, and a hand pulling the hook of a spring balance whose coil is visibly stretched. Lots of empty space. No text.

Hand-drawn coloured educational diagram — clean, elegant. Visible ink line work with soft hand-painted colour fills (coloured-pencil / gouache feel). Deep charcoal near-black background; warm muted colours; no neon, no glow, no bright flashy colours, no 3D-render look. 4:3. A simple wooden crate resting on a floor seen from the side. A long terracotta arrow points right (the applied push) and a shorter teal arrow points left (friction) — the two arrows clearly differ in length and point in opposite directions. Calm and uncluttered. No text, no numbers, no labels.

Calm and uncluttered, neat hand-lettered labels. Wide 16:9 format. Four simple panels in a row, each with a clear action-and-reaction pair of hand-drawn arrows. Panel 3, a bird in flight: a downward arrow under the wings "wings push air down", an up-and-forward arrow "air pushes bird up". Panel 4, a squid: a jet of water one way "squirts water out", an arrow the opposite way "squid shoots off".
